title: Trademark Registration Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor
description: Trademark registration in Mumbai. TM search, filing, objection handling, opposition defence. Protect your brand. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for trademark registration in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides end-to-end trademark registration services in Mumbai — search, classification, application filing, objection reply, and registration certificate. Protect your brand with expert assistance.

What is Trademark Registration Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Comprehensive trademark search across the Indian Trademark Registry and common law databases. Nice Classification advisory for all 45 classes — ensuring your mark is protected across relevant goods and services. TM-A application filing with the Mumbai Trademark Registry. Examination follow-up and objection reply (TM-O) with legal arguments and evidence of distinctiveness. Opposition proceedings defence if a third party opposes your mark. Registration certificate upon successful completion. Trademark watch service to monitor new applications that may conflict with your registered mark.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Trademark Registration in Mumbai
  Mumbai is India's commercial capital with the highest concentration of brands and trademarks. Filing here means navigating a busy registry with high examination volumes. Virtual Auditor ensures your application is correctly prepared from day one — proper classification, clear goods/services description, and distinctiveness arguments ready for examination. We handle word marks, logo marks, combination marks, and multi-class applications. Our Goregaon West office provides in-person consultation for brand strategy discussions. We also advise on international registration through the Madrid Protocol for brands expanding globally.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Brand consultation — trademark type selection, distinctiveness evaluation, class identification. Step 2: Trademark search — registry database and common law search for conflicting marks. Step 3: Application drafting and TM-A filing. Step 4: Examination monitoring and objection reply with evidence. Step 5: Publication in Trademark Journal — 4-month opposition window. Step 6: Registration certificate issuance. Step 7: Renewal tracking (10-year validity) and infringement monitoring.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Protect your brand in Mumbai. Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062

faqs.q: Can I file a trademark application for multiple classes in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Yes. India allows multi-class applications under one filing. Each additional class requires a separate government fee (Rs 4,500/9,000 per class). We advise on which classes are essential for your business and brand protection strategy.

faqs.q: What happens if my trademark application receives an objection?
faqs.a: Objections are common and not a rejection. We file a detailed reply (TM-O) with legal arguments, evidence of use, and distinctiveness justification. If the reply is accepted, the mark proceeds to publication. If not, a hearing is scheduled.

faqs.q: How do I protect my trademark internationally from Mumbai?
faqs.a: India is a member of the Madrid Protocol. You can file an international application through the Indian Trademark Registry designating any member country. We handle the complete Madrid Protocol filing process.
